item.title: Kendall Rae: The Case of Brooke Preston
item.description: Kendall Rae explores the case of Brooke Preston and what happened.

media:content.media:title: Kendall Rae: The Case of Brooke Preston

item.title: The Case of Laren Sims and Larry McNabney
item.description: Kendall Rae explores the case of Laren Sims and Larry McNabney in this true crime video.

media:content.media:title: The Case of Laren Sims and Larry McNabney
media:content.media:description: Kendall Rae explores the case of Laren Sims and Larry McNabney in this true crime video.

item.title: Richard Hoagland Left His Family To Start A New Life!
item.description:
In 1993, Richard Hoagland vanished from his Indiana home, leaving behind his wife and two sons. His family reported him missing, and the case remained unresolved for years with no confirmed sightings.
More than two decades later, authorities discovered he had been living under a new identity in Florida. Investigators said he assumed the identity of a deceased man and built a new life without contacting his family.
He was arrested in 2016 on fraud related charges. The case drew attention due to the length of time he remained undiscovered and the circumstances surrounding his disappearance.

media:content.media:title: Richard Hoagland Left His Family To Start A New Life!
media:content.media:description:
In 1993, Richard Hoagland vanished from his Indiana home, leaving behind his wife and two sons. His family reported him missing, and the case remained unresolved for years with no confirmed sightings.
More than two decades later, authorities discovered he had been living under a new identity in Florida. Investigators said he assumed the identity of a deceased man and built a new life without contacting his family.
He was arrested in 2016 on fraud related charges. The case drew attention due to the length of time he remained undiscovered and the circumstances surrounding his disappearance.
